zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Hoghton於1421年5月13日出生在英國藍卡爾霍頓 白 沃林頓時，他的父親Richard de Houghton32歲，母親Lady Margaret Richmond20歲。他於1449年與Lady Helen Mosson在英國藍卡爾霍格頓 堂爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年在英國藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Hoghton于1421年5月13日出生在英国藍卡爾霍頓 白 沃林頓时，他的父亲Richard de Houghton32岁，母亲Lady Margaret Richmond20岁。他于1449年与Lady Helen Mosson在英国藍卡爾霍格頓 堂爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年在英国藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hoghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Houghton
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Hoghton was born on 13 May 1421, in Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard de Houghton, was 32 and his mother, Lady Margaret Richmond, was 20. He married Lady Helen Mosson in 1449, in Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1479, in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 58.

Il a épousé Lady Helen Mosson en 1449, à Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1479, à Lea Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.Houghton, Lanc., England: Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Hoghton am 13. Mai 1421 in Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Houghton 32 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Richmond 20. Er hat 1449 in Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, England Lady Helen Mosson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1479 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Hoghtonが1421年5月13日にイギリスランカシュアイアホーウトン ビー ワーリントンで生まれた時，父Richard de Houghtonは32歳，母Lady Margaret Richmondは20歳であった。1449年にイギリスランカシュアイアホートン トウエルでLady Helen Mossonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1479年にイギリスランカシュアイアレア ハルで58歳で死去した。

ko.Houghton, Lanc., England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 허그h턴 비 워링턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Hoghton(이)가 1421년 5월 13일 영국 랭카실르 허그h턴 비 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Houghton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Richmond(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1449년 영국 랭카실르 호그h턴 타워에서 Lady Helen Mosson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 영국 랭카실르 리아 홀에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Hoghton nasceu em 13 de maio de 1421, em Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Houghton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Richmond, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Helen Mosson em 1449, em Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1479, em Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.Houghton, Lanc., England: хоугтон би варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Hoghton родился 13 мая 1421 г. в местности хоугтон би варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Houghton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Richmond, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Helen Mosson в 1449 г. в местности хогтон тоуир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1479 г. в местности леа холл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Lady Helen Mosson en 1449, en Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1479, en Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
